summary: Booking form UI with strict visibility logic: pickup fields shown only when pickupLocationMode === 'manual', drop fields controlled by journeyType + returnToSamePickup, GPS fallback switches to manual mode on failure.
architectural_notes: Pickup fields visibility depends ONLY on pickupLocationMode ('manual' shows, 'gps' hides) — never on journeyType
Drop fields visibility: oneway => always show; roundtrip => show unless returnToSamePickup === true
GPS fallback: on permission denied or getCurrentPosition failure, set pickupLocationMode = 'manual'

existing_features.title: In RideRequestForm.tsx, fix pickup manual fields (pickup pincode + pickup area) visibility so they are shown ONLY when pickupLocationMode === 'manual' and hidden when pickupLocationMode === 'gps'. Remove any existing condition that ties pickup field visibility to journeyType. Pickup visibility must depend exclusively on pickupLocationMode.

In RideRequestForm.tsx, fix drop field (drop pincode + drop area) visibility and required flags using exactly these rules: if journeyType === 'oneway', show drop fields and mark them required; if journeyType === 'roundtrip' and returnToSamePickup === true, hide drop fields; if journeyType === 'roundtrip' and returnToSamePickup === false, show drop fields and mark them required. Drop visibility must depend only on journeyType and returnToSamePickup.

In RideRequestForm.tsx, in the GPS geolocation handler, if navigator.geolocation permission is denied OR if getCurrentPosition fails (error callback), set pickupLocationMode to 'manual' so that pickup fields become visible. This must be applied in both the permission-denied error path and the general getCurrentPosition error path.
